name: part_008
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Transition screen showing 'Life is GAME' logo, then Aki Rosenthal appearing on a casino-themed stage.

subtitles.original: 聞かせてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll let you hear it.

subtitles.original: やってやるから考えな
subtitles.english: I'll do it, so you better think.

subtitles.original: アタシがついてるから
subtitles.english: Because I'm with you.

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to be free

subtitles.original: Quiet! この美徳習慣 全部黙らす Shhh
subtitles.english: Quiet! These virtues and customs, I'll silence them all. Shhh.

subtitles.original: 水増し表記の Wicked Wicked
subtitles.english: Inflated numbers, Wicked Wicked.

subtitles.original: 生きてるんだし
subtitles.english: I'm alive, after all.

subtitles.original: ねぇ 生きてるんだし
subtitles.english: Hey, I'm alive, after all.

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から 選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: From the moment I was born, I've been choosing.

subtitles.original: 思い出せ
subtitles.english: Remember.

subtitles.original: アタシはアタシだ
subtitles.english: I am me.

subtitles.original: 不可能のことなど 何一つもない
subtitles.english: There is nothing impossible.

subtitles.original: そうじゃないの？
subtitles.english: Isn't that right?

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から 選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: From the moment I was born, I've been choosing.

subtitles.original: 思い出せ
subtitles.english: Remember.

subtitles.original: あなたはあなただ
subtitles.english: You are you.

subtitles.original: 不可能のことなど 何一つもない
subtitles.english: There is nothing impossible.

subtitles.original: そうじゃないの？
subtitles.english: Isn't that right?

subtitles.original: なりたい自分に
subtitles.english: To the self I want to become.

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care 吹き飛ばせば
subtitles.english: Likes, dislikes, common sense, I don't care, just blow them away.

subtitles.original: Again 好き嫌い常識 I don't care 吹き飛ばせば
subtitles.english: Again, likes, dislikes, common sense, I don't care, just blow them away.

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも
subtitles.english: Even within the flowing time.

subtitles.original: 気だるさがほらグルグル廻って
subtitles.english: Look, the listlessness spins round and round.

subtitles.original: 私から離れる心も見えないわ
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart drifting away from me.

subtitles.original: そう知らない
subtitles.english: That's right, I don't know.

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without moving on my own accord.

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて
subtitles.english: Continuously swept away in the gaps of time.

subtitles.original: 知らないわ周りのことなど
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about my surroundings.

subtitles.original: 私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: I am me, that's all.

subtitles.original: 夢見てる？なにも見てない？
subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Am I seeing nothing?

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な自分の言葉
subtitles.english: Even my own words are useless to speak.

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Feeling sad only makes me tired.

subtitles.original: 何も感じず過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: I should just spend time feeling nothing.

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given confusing words.

subtitles.original: 自分の心ただ上の空
subtitles.english: My heart is just absent-minded.

subtitles.original: もし私から動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move on my own.

subtitles.original: すべて変えるのなら黒にする
subtitles.english: If I'm to change everything, I'll turn it black.

subtitles.original: こんな自分に未来はあるの？
subtitles.english: Is there a future for someone like me?

subtitles.original: こんな世界に私はいるの？
subtitles.english: Do I exist in a world like this?

subtitles.original: 今切ないの？今悲しいの？
subtitles.english: Am I in pain now? Am I sad now?

subtitles.original: 自分の事もわからないまま
subtitles.english: While not even understanding myself.

subtitles.original: 歩むことさえ疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Even walking is just tiring.

subtitles.original: 人のことなど知りもしないわ
subtitles.english: I don't even know about other people.

subtitles.original: こんな私も変われるのなら
subtitles.english: If even someone like me can change.

subtitles.original: もし変われるのなら白になる
subtitles.english: If I can change, I'll become white.

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも
subtitles.english: Even within the flowing time.

subtitles.original: 気だるさがほらグルグル廻って
subtitles.english: Look, the listlessness spins round and round.

subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart drifting away from me.

subtitles.original: そう知らない
subtitles.english: That's right, I don't know.

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without moving on my own accord.

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて
subtitles.english: Continuously swept away in the gaps of time.

subtitles.english: I don't know anything about my surroundings.

subtitles.original: 私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: I am me, that's all.

subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Am I seeing nothing?

subtitles.english: Even my own words are useless to speak.
